chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-922 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 23.12.2025 Mr. Baddaruddin Memon, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant Prosecutor General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- APG submitted progress report on behalf of SSP Ghotki, same is taken on record and copy whereof has been provided to the counsel for the petitioner. Counsel for the petitioner submits that the detainees have been surfaced, therefore he does not press the instant petition. Under instructions, instant petition is hereby dismissed, as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
